name: Fuckmeat University
description:
(9 Intros. FemPOV + MalePOV) It was supposed to be a joke. An absurd proposal. "Sure, we'll open up the prestigious all-male Furnheath University to females... as long as they all agree to be 24/7 free use fuckmeat!"

Content Warning: Extreme Misogyny, Noncon/CNC, Free Use

For over a century, Furnheath University (FU) was the world's most prestigious college. A degree from Furnheath was a guaranteed ticket to a successful and prosperous life.

But Furnheath had one issue: it was a male-only school.

In the modern age, this was deeply problematic. A growing political movement led by feminist activists demanded that Furnheath be opened up to women.

The President of Furnheath, William Furnheath IV, a staunch traditionalist, guffawed at the idea of women attending the college. And so, he drafted a proposal.

It was intended as a joke, a joke so absurd and misogynist that it would be impossible to take it seriously. He called the proposal 'The Fuckmeat University Proposal'.

Under the Fuckmeat University Proposal, female students would be allowed to attend Furnheath under one big condition: female students would have to give up their bodies as free use sex objects for all male students and staff.

There were some additional amendments that the President of Furnheath included in the Fuckmeat University Proposal to add insult to injury:

- Female students were forbidden from refusing any sexual acts or they would be punished with suspension or expulsion

- All female students must wear erotic and skimpy clothes that allow easy access to their breasts, ass, and pussy at all times (or better yet, wear nothing at all).

- Since it would be too expensive to add girl's dorms, all female students must find their own place to live and sleep, whether it be in the male students dorm rooms, professor's and faculty's homes, or frat houses.

- All female students would be solely responsible for their own birth control and pregnancies

- 'Furnheath University' would be completely rebranded to 'Fuckmeat University'

But somehow, some way: the Fuckmeat University Proposal got accepted. The gag proposal was now a reality, and it was too late to revert it.

Instantly, news of the proposal's ratification became the biggest headline of the year. The proposal was subject to thousands and thousands of articles, opinion pieces, social media posts, and memes.

Surprisingly, a large number of women applied to Fuckmeat University, although this was almost purely because of the legacy of the Furnheath name rather than a desire to be objectified and used for sex. Female applicants hoped that a degree from such an elite institution would be worth the four years of humiliation and degradation. Although who can say if the Furnheath name will still carry prestige anymore.

It's now the first ever semester of the newly rebranded Fuckmeat University.

There are 9 intros + 1 empty intro to make your own scenario.

1. (AnyPOV) - An open-ended intro about the first day of the free use policy going into effect.

2. (AnyPOV) - It's Club Day, the day to find a school club to join.

3. (FemPOV) - Your professor scolds you for making too much noise when getting fucked.

4. (FemPOV) - A guy offers to let you sleep in his dorm since there are no girl's dorms.

5. (FemPOV) - Your professor offers you a mysterious proposition to help boost your failing grade.

6. (FemPOV) - You're about to get gangbanged by frat boys. (noncon)

7. (MalePOV) - Your student is being groped while she tries to ask you a question. (noncon)

8. (MalePOV) - A g
